mapper.sql: a.id, a.property_id, p.property_code, a.amenity_code, a.amenity_name, a.category, a.status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM amenity a INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = a.property_id WHERE a.is_deleted = FALSE AND (LOWER(a.amenity_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(a.amenity_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(a.category) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%')) ORDER BY a.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM amenity a WHERE a.is_deleted = FALSE AND (LOWER(a.amenity_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(a.amenity_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(a.category) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%'))
SELECT FROM amenity a INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = a.property_id WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT FROM amenity a INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = a.property_id WHERE a.amenity_code = #{amenityCode} AND a.is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO amenity (tenant_id, property_id, amenity_code, amenity_name, category, status) VALUES (1, #{propertyId}, #{amenityCode}, #{amenityName}, #{category}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE amenity SET property_id = #{request.propertyId}, amenity_code = #{request.amenityCode}, amenity_name = #{request.amenityName}, category = #{request.category}, status = #{request.status}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE amenity SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
